title: Shimmer and Sparkle 07261 Instaglam Doll- Evie
features: One doll supplied- Luna. Glam your doll, glam yourself, glam your world with Shimmer N Sparkle InstaGlam dolls. Each Doll includes 1 x removeable brush applicator, 1 x sponge applicator, 1 x mini lipstick, 2 x eye shadow, 2 x lip gloss, designed to create the ideal on-the-go look. Four to collect: Choose from Nina, Luna, Hayley and Evie
Glam your doll. Unlock a secret sparkle reveal. Use the applicator to simply brush the dolls eyelids and lips with water to reveal a sparkly and glamourous makeup look on the doll itself

Glam yourself. Each doll also contains a hidden makeup compartment for you to share your style. Open the InstaGlam doll to reveal a secret makeup compact with real makeup and mirror for kids to create their own beauty style

Glam your world. All Shimmer N Sparkle InstaGlam dolls and beauty sets are compact and portable. They encourage creative play, suitable for birthday and christmas gifting or simply carry them to celebrations, parties and sleepovers for kids who love to role play and apply on trend, easy to use makeup

Glam your world. All Shimmer N Sparkle InstaGlam toys and on-the-go beauty sets are made with safe and high-quality materials. This cosmetic beauty toy set will not stain, is easily washable, non-toxic and is suitable for kids 5 years and up
description: From the manufacturer MEET EVIE! Glam your doll, glam yourself, glam your world with Shimmer N Sparkle InstaGlam Dolls! The fabulous range of fashion dolls with real makeup inside. Your InstaGlam character has its own unique funky hair colour, stylish outfit, and on-the-go makeup colour pallet! Each 4-inch scale fashion and beauty doll have poseable heads for added play value; when children have finished creating glamourous makeup looks, they can create lots of fun play scenarios with their InstaGlam friends. Each InstaGlam doll includes a personalised glamourous gold stand to display the doll when playtime is finished. GLAM ON THE GO! Glam Your World! All Shimmer N Sparkle InstaGlam dolls and beauty sets are compact and portable, they can be taken anywhere for glam on the go! All Shimmer N Sparkle InstaGlam toys and on-the-go beauty sets are made with safe and high-quality materials. This cosmetic beauty toy set will not stain, is easily washable, non-toxic and is suitable for kids 8 years and up. GLAM YOUR DOLL! GLAM YOURSELF! GLAM YOUR WORLD! GLAM YOUR DOLL! Unlock a secret sparkle reveal. Use the applicator to simply brush the dolls eyelids and lips with water to reveal a super sparkly and glamourous makeup look on the doll itself! GLAM YOURSELF! Each doll also contains a hidden makeup compartment for you to share your style. Open the InstaGlam doll to reveal a secret makeup compact with real makeup and mirror for kids to create their own beauty style! GLAM YOUR WORLD! All Shimmer N Sparkle InstaGlam dolls and beauty sets are compact and portable! They encourage creative play, perfect for birthday and Christmas gifting, or simply carry them to celebrations, parties, and sleepovers for kids who love to role play and apply on trend, easy to use makeup CONTENTS Each Doll includes 1 x removeable brush applicator, 1 x sponge applicator, 1 x mini lipstick, 2 x eye shadow, 2 x lip gloss, designed to create the perfect on-the-go look!
